tickets.title: [X Platform] Repo hygiene: ignore generated service binaries
tickets.description:
## Request summary
Apply artifact hygiene so generated service binaries are not accidentally committed.

## Scope
- Update root and service ignore rules for generated Go binaries.
- Narrow broad bin ignore behavior to explicit local binary artifacts.

## Affected areas/files
- .gitignore
- services/omnichannel/.gitignore

## Validation plan
- Run git check-ignore for backend api/worker binaries and bin/platform.

## Risks/dependencies
- Ensure path-specific ignores do not hide legitimate source files.

## Project
X Platform

tickets.title: [X Platform] Repo hygiene: add access-api local ignore policy
tickets.description:
## Request summary
Standardize service-level ignore hygiene for access-api local artifacts.

## Scope
- Add services/access-api/.gitignore for env, build, and runtime byproducts.

## Affected areas/files
- services/access-api/.gitignore

## Validation plan
- Run git check-ignore services/access-api/api and verify expected match.

## Risks/dependencies
- Must preserve .env.example visibility while masking local secrets.

## Project
X Platform

tickets.title: [X Platform] Repo hygiene: expand cleanup tooling and command entrypoints
tickets.description:
## Request summary
Make cleanup repeatable by covering high-volume artifacts and exposing standard command entrypoints.

## Scope
- Extend scripts/clean with --full mode.
- Add cleanup scripts to package.json.
- Add make clean and make clean-full targets.

## Affected areas/files
- scripts/clean
- scripts/README.md
- package.json
- Makefile

## Validation plan
- Run ./scripts/clean --dry-run and ./scripts/clean --dry-run --full.

## Risks/dependencies
- Full cleanup is destructive for local dependency caches; dry-run must stay available.

## Project
X Platform

tickets.title: [X Platform] Repo hygiene: add root npm workspace guidance
tickets.description:
## Request summary
Reduce install drift by pinning package manager version and defining workspace boundaries at repo root.

## Scope
- Add packageManager pin and workspaces list in root package.json.

## Affected areas/files
- package.json

## Validation plan
- Confirm npm scripts remain callable from root and workspace paths resolve correctly.

## Risks/dependencies
- Existing per-project lockfiles remain and should be addressed in a follow-up migration if needed.

## Project
X Platform

tickets.title: [X Platform] Repo hygiene: final validation and status alignment
tickets.description:
## Request summary
Close the hygiene execution with aligned plan status, validation evidence, and commit mapping.

## Scope
- Run final ignore and cleanup validations.
- Update plan progress, decision log, outcomes, and ticket tracker.

## Affected areas/files
- plans/repo-hygiene-bloat-execplan.md

## Validation plan
- Verify dry-run outputs and git check-ignore mappings are recorded in plan artifacts.

## Risks/dependencies
- None beyond maintaining plan/code synchronization.

## Project
X Platform

tickets.title: [X Platform][medium] Follow-up: unify Node dependency strategy across workspaces
tickets.description:
## Observed issue/opportunity
Workspace-level package manager guidance was added. Omnichannel frontend was consolidated into cloud-console; single root lockfile is in use.

## Affected areas/files
- package-lock.json (root)
- mcp/ (uses root lockfile via workspaces)

## Expected outcome
Confirm single lockfile strategy is documented. Ensure mcp workspace install is deterministic.

## Validation notes
- npm ci from root; npm run mcp:check passes.

## Category
medium

## Project
X Platform
